page.title: Diagrams
gallery.empty: No diagrams yet. Create one to get started.
gallery.linkedCardsHelperText: Link to one or more cards (optional)
gallery.delete.title: Delete Diagram
gallery.delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
viewer.title: Diagram Viewer
viewer.toolbar.editTooltip: Open the diagram in the editor
editor.title: Diagram Editor
editor.allUpToDate: All cards are up to date
editor.toolbar.iconsNoneToApply: All cards already show their card-type icon
editor.unlinked: Card unlinked — shape kept on the canvas
editor.duplicate.pendingRegen: Duplicate detected — new pending card created instead of reusing the link
editor.duplicate.unlinked: Duplicate detected — copy unlinked from the original card
editor.restore.banner: Unsaved changes from {{when}} were found locally.
editor.errors.editorNotReady: Editor not ready — try again in a moment
editor.errors.applyViewFailed: Failed to apply the selected view
editor.errors.restoreEdgeFailed: Could not restore the edge — the endpoints are no longer on the canvas.
editor.noChildren: This card has no children to drill into.
editor.edgeRestored: Edge restored — relation kept in inventory
editor.containerized: Shape converted to a container — drag cards into it to nest them.
editor.errors.parentTypeMismatch: Hierarchy is restricted to cards of the same type — the move was reverted.
editor.parentChange.attachBody: Add «{{child}}» as a child of «{{parent}}»? Choosing «No» puts the card back where it was.
editor.parentChange.detachBody: Detach «{{child}}» from «{{parent}}»? It will become a root card on next sync. Choosing «No» puts it back inside the container.
editor.alreadyDrilled: This card is already shown as a container with its children inside.
editor.alreadyRolledUp: This card already lives inside a parent container — roll-up would create a duplicate.
editor.parentAlreadyOnCanvas: The parent card is already on the canvas — remove that cell first if you want it as a container.
editor.allChildrenAlreadyOnCanvas: All of the picked children are already on the canvas; nothing to drill into.
editor.allNeighboursAlreadyOnCanvas: All matching neighbours are already on the canvas; nothing to insert.
editor.someNeighboursSkipped_one: Skipped {{count}} neighbour that's already on the canvas.
editor.someNeighboursSkipped_other: Skipped {{count}} neighbours that are already on the canvas.
editor.deleteRelation.title: Delete relation?
editor.deleteRelation.body: Delete the «{{label}}» relation between «{{source}}» and «{{target}}»? Choosing «No» puts the edge back on the canvas without touching the inventory.
editor.expandMenu.noParent: No parent to roll up to.
editor.expandMenu.title: Expand related cards
sync.title: Synchronise
sync.willDeleteRelation: Will be deleted from inventory on sync
sync.willArchive: Card will be archived in inventory on sync
sync.willKeepInInventory: Removed from diagram only — card kept in inventory
sync.parentDetach: Will become a root card (currently nested under «{{parent}}»)
sync.alsoArchive: Also archive the card in inventory
cardPicker.title: Insert Card
cardPicker.selectOrSearch: Select a type or search to browse
insertDialog.selectOrSearch: Pick a type or start typing to search.
createOnDiagram.title: Create Card
createOnDiagram.pendingHintPre: Will be added to the diagram as a pending
createOnDiagram.pendingHintPost: Synchronise to save it to the inventory.
relationPicker.title: Pick Relation Type
relationPicker.noValidTypes: No valid relation types exist between these two card types in the metamodel.

gallery.author: Author
gallery.sort.name: Name (A–Z)
manageGroups.title: Manage Groups
manageGroups.empty: No groups yet. Create one to organize your diagrams.
manageGroups.deleteConfirm: Delete group «{{name}}»? Diagrams are kept; they just lose this grouping.
assignGroups.title: Add to Groups
assignGroups.subtitle: Organize «{{name}}» into one or more groups.
assignGroups.empty: No groups yet — create one below.
